zh.St Laurence in Thanet, Kent, England: 英國肯特聖 勞倫斯 在 森特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes於1522年出生在英國時，她的父親Henry Goldhop17歲，母親Julia Rosenberry20歲。她於1552年5月16日與Thomas Baker在英國素可霍沙安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國素瑞格達爾明。

zh-hans.St Laurence in Thanet, Kent, England: 英国肯特聖 勞倫斯 在 森特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes于1522年出生在英国时，她的父亲Henry Goldhop17岁，母亲Julia Rosenberry20岁。她于1552年5月16日与Thomas Baker在英国素可霍沙安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国素瑞格達爾明。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes was born in 1522, in England, her father, Henry Goldhop, was 17 and her mother, Julia Rosenberry, was 20. She married Thomas Baker on 16 May 1552, in Horsham, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She was buried in Godalming, Surrey, England.

Elle a épousé Thomas Baker le 16 mai 1552, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elleenterrée à Godalming, Surrey, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnesが1522年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Henry Goldhopは17歳，母Julia Rosenberryは20歳であった。1552年5月16日にイギリススセックスホールシャムでThomas Bakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススリーゴダルミングにて埋葬された。

ko.St Laurence in Thanet, Kent, England: 영국 켄트 스트 로렌스 인 스아닛
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes(이)가 1522년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Goldhop(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julia Rosenberry(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1552년 5월 16일 영국 수세스 호르샤에서 Thomas Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 수리 고다밍에 묻혔다.

ru.St Laurence in Thanet, Kent, England: ст лоуренс ин танет, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes родилась в 1522 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Goldhop было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Julia Rosenberry, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Baker 16 мая 1552 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности годалминг, сурри, Англия.
